    <p>{`A protocol for debugging Live Activity schemas in Adobe Assurance.`}</p>
    <p>{`Conforming to this protocol allows you to provide sample data for your Live Activity attributes and content state, which can be used to validate your Live Activity schema in Adobe Assurance during development and testing.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "ios-protocol---liveactivityassurancedebuggable"
    }}>{`iOS Protocol - LiveActivityAssuranceDebuggable`}</h2>

    }}>{`Requirements`}</h2>

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`@available(iOS 16.1, *)
extension FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes: LiveActivityAssuranceDebuggable {

                liveActivityData: LiveActivityData(liveActivityID: "debug-order-123"),
                restaurantName: "Debug Restaurant"
            ),
            ContentState(
                driverName: "Debug Driver",
                deliveryTime: "15 minutes",
                orderStatus: "Preparing"
            )
        )
    }
}
